scripts.build: npm run build -w @tecnofal/core && npm run build -w @tecnofal/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tecnofal/core && npm run typecheck -w @tecnofal/provider-supabase && npm run typecheck -w @tecnofal/provider-nhost && npm run typecheck -w @tecnofal/provider-local && npm run typecheck -w @tecnofal/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tecnofal/core && npm run test -w @tecnofal/provider-local && npm run test:e2e -w @tecnofal/extension
